items.title: Zeno raises $25M to speed up production of its battery-swap motorbikes
items.description: The startup, co-founded by Tesla and Apple alumni, has sold nearly 1,000 of its motorbikes so far.

items.title: Meta will allow rival AI chatbots on WhatsApp in Europe, but for a fee

items.title: Science Corp raises $230M as it races to bring its brain implant to market
items.description: A source close to the company says the round assigns Science a post-money valuation of $1.25 billion.

items.title: How 1,000+ customer calls shaped a breakout enterprise AI startup

items.title: Rivian is betting its future on one of the fastest EV launches in US history
items.description: If Rivian reaches its R2 sales target in 2026, it will be one of the fastest ramp-ups ever of a new EV in the United States.
